# FinTrack+

> Finance tracker built for Indian event planners. Track expenses, vendors, partners, and GST — offline-first with cloud sync. Launch price ₹599/month.

FinTrack+ helps wedding and event planning businesses track every rupee across projects, vendors, partners, and team members. It is offline-first, GST-ready, and supports up to 3 team members per organization.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, pricing, and FAQs.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user data is collected, stored, and protected.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Legal terms governing use of FinTrack+.
- [Refund & Cancellation Policy](/refund): Subscription cancellation and refund terms.

## Optional

- [App](https://app.fintrackplus.com/): Authenticated web application for existing users.
